envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. Admin approval at D4 Governance Review is mandatory before any region may activate downstream.
audit_expectations: future ADMIN_ACTION:MAP_REGION_APPROVED at D4 governance review

items.name: Company Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed Company Map regions (initial department rollout / sensitive-systems exclusion list / compliance posture summary) consumed from the Company Map Assessment output candidates. Every region is PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED; admin review at D4 is mandatory.
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes which Company Map regions admins should approve first. Includes initial-department rollout candidates, sensitive-system exclusions, and a neutral compliance posture summary per ADR-0070.
items.model_usage_notes: Use ranked_regions[].rank for surfacing order. Treat HIGH_CONFIDENCE as 'safe to propose'; REQUIRES_ADMIN_REVIEW as 'must surface but never auto-activate'; BLOCKED_BY_POLICY as 'excluded from proposal'.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: Admin-supplied list from assessment intake; admin must explicitly approve before any downstream Role / Tool / Workflow Map region activates within these departments.
Sensitive systems named by admin are absolute exclusions downstream; high confidence because the user explicitly named them and Risk Map intake reinforces them.
Compliance vocabulary must be neutral per ADR-0070 — never claim regulator approval or guaranteed compliance. Admin approval required.

items.rationale: Company Map anchors every downstream Map. Approving the initial-rollout departments + sensitive-systems exclusion + compliance posture summary in that order minimizes blast radius and preserves the Risk Map's hard exclusions before any role-level activity begins. The recommendation never claims to know the company beyond what admin + user intake provided.
cross_map_dependencies: Org / Relationship Map depends on Company Map (departments anchor reporting structure)
Role Map depends on Company Map (departments + customer type bound role activation)
Tool Map depends on Company Map (forbidden tools for initial rollout draw from sensitive-systems exclusion)
Risk Map cross-references Company Map (compliance-sensitive surfaces inherit company regions/jurisdictions)
items.approval_gate_required: Admin policy approval at D4 Governance Review per ADR-0082 Amendment 1 cartographer doctrine. Without admin approval no Company Map region may activate downstream.
DMW_scope_implications: Company Map establishes the tenant-scope ceiling that every downstream DMW scope inherits
Initial-rollout departments bound Department-scoped DMW memory
Sensitive-systems exclusion remains absolute downstream — no DMW scope may include them without explicit later admin authorization
Per ADR-0037: regions/jurisdictions bound jurisdiction-aware DMW scope
governance_review_points: Admin must approve initial-rollout departments before any downstream Map region activates
Compliance vocabulary must stay neutral per ADR-0070
No workforce-scoring inferences from company facts (RULE 0 + RULE 20)
safe_defaults: Conservative ranking for unknown / ambiguous regions
BLOCKED_BY_POLICY confidence reserved for regions that fail Risk Map exclusions
audit_expectations: no new audit literal at D3
